name: Italian Meat Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter and olive oil in a large frying pan. Heat over medium heat.
2. Add onions and sauté for one minute.
3. Add carrots, celery, mushrooms, and parsley. Cook, stirring frequently for 5 minutes.
4. Crumble the ground beef into the pan and cook, stirring frequently until lightly browned.
5. Sprinkle flour over the ground beef and stir until well blended.
6. Stir in tomato purée. Gradually add red wine, stirring constantly.
7. Add beef broth and season with salt, pepper, oregano, and garlic as desired.
8. Simmer for about 1 hour or until thickened.
9. Serve over pasta. Makes approximately five cups of sauce.
